text.title: Agency P&L Tracker Template Failure Modes

antipattern.symptom: Owner does books quarterly; surprised by Q1 results in May.
antipattern.fix: Monthly close cadence in calendar; tg-send reminder day 3 of next month.

antipattern.symptom: Gross margin shows 70%; actual is 50%; pricing decisions wrong.
antipattern.root-cause: Contractor fees booked as OpEx alongside payroll.

antipattern.symptom: Owner can't tell why margin shrank.
antipattern.fix: Weekly sub-tracker feeds monthly utilisation; both required.

antipattern.symptom: P&L produced and filed; never compared to plan.
